name: Pickling Cucumbers Frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cucumbers, onions, salt and water in a glass bowl.
2. Let stand at room temperature for 2 hours.
3. Add sugar and vinegar, stirring until sugar is dissolved.
4. Pack the mixture lightly into two 1-pint freezer containers or jars, leaving 1-inch space at the top.
5. Cover tightly and freeze overnight or up to 6 weeks.
6. Thaw at room temperature for 4 hours.
7. Refrigerate any leftovers up to 1 week.
